description: Vertical feature slice: complete user registration and login flow with JWT-based session management. Users register as GUEST or HOST. Passwords are BCrypt hashed. This is a self-contained deployable slice.
functional_requirements: Users can register with a username, password, and role (GUEST or HOST)
Registered users can login with username and password to receive a JWT token
JWT-protected endpoints reject unauthenticated requests with 401
Duplicate username registration returns a 409 Conflict error
non_functional_requirements: Registration and login endpoints are public (no authentication required)
